tagline: Home-based painting franchise with a validated semi-absentee model, Sherwin-Williams national partnership, and $476K average unit revenue in 2024.
description_short: 360 Painting is a home-based residential and commercial painting franchise under Premium Service Brands. Owners manage sales and operations without ever picking up a brush, with a validated semi-absentee model backed by a centralized contact center and performance coaching. National partnerships with Sherwin-Williams and Home Depot create built-in lead flow, making this a strong fit for executives seeking a scalable, low-overhead service business.
market_intelligence_insight: The US painters industry generates $49B annually and has grown at a 2.2% CAGR over the past five years. Aging housing stock with a median home age of roughly 40 years creates consistent repainting demand regardless of new construction cycles. The global house painting services market is projected to grow at 5.5-6.3% CAGR through 2034 driven by renovation trends and rising homeowner investment in property value.
item_19_headline: Average gross sales of $476,452 per franchised business in 2024 across 102 operating units
ongoing_support: field consulting,performance coaching,contact center,accounting advisory,online training,marketing support
